title: Living Legend Rewamped
description: A clean and optimized PvP/SMP resource pack with low particles, smooth GUI, and enhanced visuals for better gameplay.
body:
[![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ec6f3501deba4026bb8818757f2d9f1b4b2537a.png)](https://discord.gg/Hx6dtWck)

Living Legend Rewamp is a clean and lightweight Minecraft resource pack inspired by the visual style and gameplay experience associated with India’s well-known PvP player, **Living Legend**.

This project is a fan-made rework of the original **80k pack**, redesigned with a smoother and more polished presentation while maintaining a familiar competitive feel.
The pack focuses on clean visuals, simplified particles, and a balanced vanilla-friendly style suitable for both PvP and SMP gameplay.

To support different player preferences, the resource pack is divided into two separate variants — one focused on a more default vanilla appearance and another offering slightly enhanced visuals while still keeping the gameplay experience lightweight and smooth.

The overall goal of the pack is to provide a clean competitive look without heavily changing Minecraft’s original aesthetic.

---

## 🌊 Overview

Living Legend Rewamp was designed for players who prefer a simple, competitive, and visually clean gameplay experience.
The pack avoids overly detailed textures and excessive visual clutter, making it suitable for long PvP sessions, SMP gameplay, and everyday survival use.

Every element has been adjusted with consistency and readability in mind, helping maintain clear visibility during combat while preserving a familiar vanilla atmosphere.

Both included variants are built to feel lightweight and comfortable for regular gameplay, allowing players to choose between a more traditional vanilla-inspired style or a slightly enhanced visual experience depending on personal preference.

![utils](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2df8070414e5f0b279bf60a18d6457e2d65ba02a_0.webp)


## ✨ Features

> ✔ Clean and lightweight design
> ✔ Simplified particles and visuals
> ✔ Smooth custom GUI
> ✔ Vanilla-friendly gameplay style
> ✔ Suitable for PvP, SMP & Survival

---

## 🧩 Resolution

> **16x Default Minecraft Resolution**

---

## ⚠ Disclaimer

This is a **fan-made resource pack** inspired by Living Legend and is not officially affiliated with or endorsed by the original creator.

---

### 👤 Creator

> Reworked by **GAMER_TIGE99**
